meaning_english: The scientific study of grasses.
A person who unselfishly helps or shows concern for the well-being of others.
Lacking a moral sense; unconcerned with the rightness or wrongness of something.
A medical specialist who administers drugs to cause a loss of sensation during surgery.
A person who is fond of or greatly admires England or the English.
A person who collects or has a great love of books.
A doctor who specializes in the study or treatment of heart diseases.
The supposed prediction of a person's future from the lines on their palms.
A doctor who specializes in the treatment of skin disorders.

meaning_kannada: ಕಲೆ ಅಥವಾ ಜ್ಞಾನದಲ್ಲಿ ಆಳವಿಲ್ಲದ ಆಸಕ್ತಿ ಹೊಂದಿರುವವನು
meaning_english: A person who cultivates an area of interest without real commitment or knowledge.
A person who is a skilled horseback rider.
The branch of medicine dealing with the health and care of old people.
An excessively greedy eater.
The study of handwriting, especially as a means of analyzing character.
A payment given for professional services rendered without a regular charge.
The visual images and symbols used in a work of art.
A mode of behavior or way of thought peculiar to an individual.

The branch of science concerned with the processes of the atmosphere.
A person who dislikes or is strongly prejudiced against women.
The branch of medicine that deals with the disorders of the nerves.
A specialist in the branch of medicine concerned with the eye.
The branch of science concerned with fossil animals and plants.
A medical practitioner specializing in children and their diseases.
A person who knows and is able to use several languages.
The scientific study of the human mind and its functions.
A person who acts obsequiously toward someone important to gain advantage.
The study of the nature of God and religious belief.
An imagined place or state in which everything is perfect.
The study of fermentation and its practical uses.
